name: einsight
description: eInsight - App Review Intelligence Tool for eUp Group

scripts.dev: concurrently -n scraper,backend,frontend -c magenta,cyan,green "npm --prefix scraper run dev" "cd backend && . .venv/bin/activate && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix scraper install && npm --prefix frontend install && cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
